series_metadata.series_title: APPLICATION FOR CERTIFICATE OF REGISTRATION FORM
series_metadata.series_description: Applications used to remit collected Sales Tax from out of state sellers

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Kept 35 years then destroyed. ; Electronic: Kept 35 years then erased. ; Paper: Original applications are retained for 1 month, imaged (.pdf), then shred., Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
